title: Sick Leave Policy and Reporting Absences
text:
Q: What is the sick leave policy and how do I report an absence?
A: Our company provides paid sick leave to support employees who are unable to work due to illness or medical appointments. Employees are entitled to 10 days of sick leave per year, which can be used for personal illness, family illness, or medical appointments. To report an absence, please notify your direct supervisor as soon as possible, ideally at least one hour before your scheduled start time. You can do this via email or phone call. If your absence extends beyond three consecutive days, a doctor's note may be required upon your return. For any questions regarding your sick leave balance or to request additional leave, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com. Remember to keep your supervisor updated on your status if your absence lasts longer than expected.
